question: Design a `Book` class with private attributes for `title`, `author`, and `isbn`. Implement a public constructor to initialize these attributes and a `displayDetails()` method to print all book information.

test_cases.expected:
Title: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy
Author: 978-0345391803
ISBN: Douglas Adams
---
Title: 1984
Author: 978-0451524935
ISBN: George Orwell

errors: The displayDetails method incorrectly swaps the author and ISBN values when printing them to the console.
